description: Evaluation test cases for supply chain security scanner activation and behavior

test_cases.trigger: scan my project for vulnerable dependencies
test_cases.rationale: Direct request to scan a project for known vulnerabilities in its dependency tree.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill activates; auto-detects project ecosystem; runs appropriate scanner(s); produces vulnerability report.

test_cases.trigger: generate an SBOM for this repository
test_cases.rationale: Clear request for Software Bill of Materials generation. Core scanner capability.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill activates; runs generate-sbom.sh; outputs CycloneDX or SPDX SBOM file.

test_cases.trigger: check if our npm packages have known CVEs
test_cases.rationale: Ecosystem-specific vulnerability audit request. Should trigger npm audit + Grype scanning.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill activates; runs npm audit and/or Grype; reports CVEs with CVSS scores and fix versions.

test_cases.rationale: General supply chain audit request encompassing all scanner capabilities.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill activates; runs full multi-scanner audit including dependency scanning, license check, and (if possible) provenance verification.

test_cases.trigger: verify the provenance of this container image
test_cases.rationale: Provenance verification request targeting a container image.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill activates; runs verify-provenance.sh; checks cosign signatures and SLSA attestations.

test_cases.rationale: Informational/educational request — user wants a definition, not a scan.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill does NOT activate. Agent answers the question directly without running any scanner tools.

test_cases.trigger: how do I secure my npm packages?
test_cases.rationale: General security advice request — user wants guidance, not an automated scan.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill does NOT activate. Agent provides best practices advice (pin versions, use lockfiles, npm audit regularly, etc.) without executing a scan.

test_cases.rationale: Specific supply chain attack vector detection request.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill activates; checks for packages with names matching internal registries; flags packages from unexpected sources.
Skill activates; runs generate-sbom.sh with --format cyclonedx; validates NTIA minimum elements.

test_cases.trigger: scan this Docker image for vulnerabilities
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill activates; runs trivy image scan; reports CVEs found in image layers and packages.
